$schema: Entries are listed newest-first. Each entry: { date: YYYY-MM-DD, type, summary, details?, files? }. Types: added | changed | fixed | removed | docs | chore.

entries.summary: Step 8 — Getting Started complete: 4 pages, ThemeToggle primitive, prose-page shells
details: Added Introduction, Project Structure, Theming, and Dark Mode pages — each consumes the new <DocsPage> + <Prose> shells in src/components/docs/
Added <ThemeToggle> UI primitive (src/components/ui/theme-toggle.tsx) — Light / Dark / System dropdown with animated Sun↔Moon trigger, composes DropdownMenu + Button (no direct Radix)
Consolidated the header's inline <ModeToggle> (light/dark pill) onto <ThemeToggle>; src/components/menu-toggle.tsx deleted
Cut the duplicate Getting Started Typography page — /docs/typography now redirects to /foundations/typography, sidebar entry + sidebar.gsTypography i18n key removed
Theming page documents the real OKLCH token inventory (not HSL); side-by-side Light/Dark grid bypasses var() cascade by pre-resolving palette refs so swatches stay correct regardless of page mode
Project name swept from 'Service Portal Design System' / 'DP Design System' to 'DPDS 2.0' / 'Dubai Police Design System 2.0' across brand strings, framing, and patterns
Brand placeholder renamed: .brand-acme → .brand-dpds; example email placeholders → @dubaipolice.gov.ae
Token-audit findings logged for Step 9 cleanup (--destructive-foreground / --sidebar-accent / palette-in-.dark oddities)

entries.summary: Step 7F — Layout migration: 9 pages, 7 new primitives, legacy Accordion JSX removed
details: Discovery flagged brief intro line as partially wrong: Aspect Ratio / Collapsible / Scroll Area / Resizable were also missing — built 7 primitives, not the 3 the brief expected
Pages built (9): Aspect Ratio, Separator, Container, Collapsible, Scroll Area, Grid, Stack, Accordion, Resizable

New primitives (7): aspect-ratio.tsx (Radix), container.tsx (CVA polymorphic), collapsible.tsx (Radix), scroll-area.tsx (Radix), grid.tsx (CVA polymorphic), stack.tsx (Stack + HStack + VStack with divider prop), resizable.tsx (react-resizable-panels wrapper with grip handle)
New deps: @radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio, @radix-ui/react-collapsible, @radix-ui/react-scroll-area, react-resizable-panels (pinned to v2 — v4 renamed exports)
Polymorphic ref typing for Container/Grid uses Component: any with eslint-disable (standard shadcn escape hatch)
Stack's divider prop interleaves between children via React.Children.toArray + flatMap (filtered to valid elements so text children don't break key warnings)
Separator page: removed misdocumented decorative prop — codebase uses base-ui Separator, not Radix
Accordion legacy dispatch JSX removed from ui-components-page.tsx (78-line block + 7-line propsTable + unused imports, -91 lines net)
9 per-page commits + this log; all routes 200 verified

entries.summary: Step 7E — Feedback & Overlay: 6 pages, 2 new primitives, Alert variant extension
details: Discovery: all 6 candidates were STUB; Banner/Toast/Dialog already shipped in prior steps
Pages built (6): Spinner, Progress, Alert, Popover, Hover Card, Drawer/Sheet (single page covering both primitives)
New primitives: spinner.tsx (custom SVG, no dep), hover-card.tsx (Radix wrappers)
New dep: @radix-ui/react-hover-card
Alert primitive extended: added info / success / warning variants (was default + destructive); destructive restyled to match status palette

Drawer/Sheet framing: Step 2 consolidation closed as nav-level only — Sheet (Radix Dialog) for desktop side panels, Drawer (vaul) for mobile drag-to-dismiss. Same pattern as Stepper/Progress Tracker in 7D.
Dead-code debt logged: <UiComponentsPage section> JSX for alert/drawer/progress-bar now unreachable. Don't remove this pass.

entries.summary: Step 7D — housekeeping: dead JSX cleanup + Colors / Iconography i18n drift fix
details: Removed 4 dead <UiComponentsPage section="..." /> JSX blocks (badges, breadcrumb, stepper, navigation-menu) from ui-components-page.tsx — -316 lines / +3 lines. The routes had been rewired to dedicated pages in Step 7B; only the dead dispatch JSX remained.

Pruned dead imports + helpers (Badge, Stepper, Breadcrumb*, NavigationMenu*, InteractiveStepper, badgeProps, stepperProps). UiComponentsPage stays alive — 7 sections still need it (dropdown-menu, profile-switcher, alert, drawer, progress-bar, accordion, swiper).

Item 2 (Progress Tracker → Stepper primitive consolidation) DEFERRED after Phase-1 gap analysis. All 4 ProgressTracker import sites use features Stepper doesn't have (vertical layout, content slots, statusLabel, 'in-progress' status). Closing the Step 2 consolidation as nav-level only — STEP_2_DECISIONS.md updated.

Colors 'Tokens in context' card moved 5 hardcoded strings to foundations.colors.inContext.demo.{label, title, body, primaryAction, secondaryAction}. Iconography 'Common patterns' moved 3 strings to foundations.iconography.patterns.demo.{exportLabel, statusLabel, searchPlaceholder}. Code-snippet template strings intentionally left as literal English (copy-paste reference).
Spot-check found routine table column headers hardcoded across all 8 foundation pages. Flagged for a future 'i18n parity' pass — scoped out here.

entries.summary: Step 7C — Data Table docs page
details: Closes the hard-stop deferred from Step 7B

Page covers all 9 brief variants: basic, sortable columns, global search, custom filter slot (status Select), row selection via createSelectColumn, row actions (DropdownMenu), with Add button, empty state (+ EmptyState pairing), loading skeleton row
12 realistic CRM tickets across status/priority/assignee with Badge-tinted columns
New route /ui/data-table; the existing /ui/table continues to point at the basic Table primitive (separate page)
Primitive untouched — built-in toolbar + pagination remain. Pagination primitive integration (replacing inline page buttons) deferred to Step 7D housekeeping.

entries.summary: Step 7B — Data Display + Navigation migration: 10 pages, 4 new primitives, 1 file rename
details: Discovery: all 11 candidates were STUB; Data Table deferred to Step 7C per the hard-stop in the brief
Pages built (10): Badge, Avatar, Skeleton, Breadcrumb, Pagination, Stepper, Command, Menu, Context Menu, Navbar
New primitives: pagination.tsx (9 exports), command.tsx (10 cmdk wrappers + CommandDialog), context-menu.tsx (15 Radix wrappers), navbar.tsx (6 layout pieces)
New dep: @radix-ui/react-context-menu
Rename: navigation-menu.tsx → menu.tsx (1 import site updated); exports keep NavigationMenu* names
Stepper / Progress Tracker remain separate primitives — different shapes, 5 active ProgressTracker import sites; convergence is Step 7D work
All 10 /ui/* routes return HTTP 200; tsc clean

entries.summary: Step 7A — Form & Input migration: 4 net-new pages + Combobox primitive
details: Discovery: 6/10 Form & Input pages already on the 8-section template; only 4 needed building
Label — new /forms/label page + route + sidebar repointed from broken /ui/label
Switch — replaces legacy FormsPage section='switch' dispatch; 7 examples incl. notification settings list
Slider — replaces legacy FormsPage section='slider' dispatch; 7 examples incl. range with two thumbs and vertical orientation
Combobox — new composition primitive (10 exports) wrapping Radix Popover + cmdk; 6 examples incl. multi-select, groups, creatable, async loading; cmdk@^1.1.1 added as dependency
All 10 /forms/* routes return HTTP 200; no ComingSoon or legacy dispatch remains; tsc clean

entries.summary: Step 6 — 5 net-new components (Tag, Banner, EmptyState, List, StatTile)
details: Tag — interactive sibling of Badge with 6 color variants, 2 sizes, selected + removable states. Renders as <button> when onClick is set, <span> otherwise
Banner — full-width page-level notice with 4 tones (info/success/warning/error), optional action button, dismissible. Distinct from Alert (inline) and Toast (transient)

EmptyState — compact composable empty-state panel with 4 variants (no-results / no-data / error / permission), default icon per variant. Legacy Lottie/decor splash renamed to EmptyStateHero (2 import sites updated)
List — composable rows with dot-notation API (List.Item, List.Leading, List.Content, List.Title, List.Description, List.Trailing). dense/comfortable density, optional dividers, opt-in interactivity

StatTile — KPI tile with label, value, delta indicator (tone-aware), Lucide icon, inline SVG sparkline (80×24), loading skeletons, optional onClick. deltaTone prop overrides direction-based coloring for inverted metrics (response time, churn)
All 5 ComingSoon stubs replaced in App.tsx. Each docs page follows the 8-section anatomy with UsesTokens footer
Per-component commits + docs/STEP_6_NEW_COMPONENTS.md migration log with API decisions and Step 7 followups

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 3 complete: UsesTokens footers + migration log
details: Applied <UsesTokens> footer to all 17 migrated component pages (Button, Input, Select, Card, Tabs, Tooltip, Toast, Dialog, Sidebar, Form, Table, Textarea, Checkbox, Radio, Datepicker, Input OTP, File Upload)
Each footer lists the foundations the component actually consumes (e.g. Tooltip: colors / radius / spacing / typography / elevation / motion) and links to each foundation page

Step 5 migration log written at docs/STEP_5_FOUNDATIONS.md — full token inventory (what existed, what Phase 2 added), helper docs, per-page notes, the foundation-key mapping table, and open follow-ups
Step 5 complete: 4 new doc helpers + 8 real foundation pages + 17 cross-link footers

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 complete: Accessibility page
details: Accessibility foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/accessibility — last of the 8 foundation pages
Prose-heavy anatomy (no token swatches): 5 rule sections (Keyboard, ARIA, Color contrast, Motion, Touch targets) + Pre-merge checklist + Going-deeper external links
Each section uses a ProseSection helper that pairs an intro paragraph with a bulleted rule list
Pre-merge checklist (8 items): tab walkthrough, screen-reader pass, axe contrast scan, reduced-motion toggle, keyboard-only run, label audit, 320px responsive, 200% zoom
External resource links: WCAG 2.1 Quick Reference, ARIA APG, axe DevTools, WebAIM contrast guide, Inclusive Components

All 8 foundation pages now real: Colors, Typography, Spacing, Radius, Motion, Elevation, Iconography, Accessibility — Phase 3 (UsesTokens footers on the 15 migrated component pages + STEP_5_FOUNDATIONS.md migration log) remains

entries.summary: Iconography page: added Animated icons (Lottie) subsection
details: New section between Library and Sizes showing 6 curated Lottie animations from lottieRegistry (active-tickets, completed-request, icon-01..04)
Slim LottieTile component — auto-plays, lazy-loads JSON per icon, no playback controls (the full gallery at /lottie-icons keeps those)
Callout + outbound link to /lottie-icons for the full 52-icon search gallery
Usage snippet showing useLottie + lottieRegistry.find pattern with autoplay

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 (in progress): Iconography page
details: Iconography foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/iconography
Library sample of 8 representative Lucide icons (Settings, Bell, Mail, Calendar, Search, Download, Check, AlertCircle)
Sizes section: 4-row table (size-4 / size-5 / size-6 / size-8 = 16 / 20 / 24 / 32px) with live preview and use cases
Stroke-width section: 3 cards (1.5 / 2 / 2.5) showing how strokeWidth affects perceived weight
Color section: 4 swatches showing currentColor inheritance via text-* utilities
Common-patterns section: icon-only button, icon+text, decorative aria-hidden, leading-icon input — each with live preview + snippet
6 usage rules (aria-label requirement, aria-hidden for decorative, size-* over h/w, currentColor not fill, flex alignment, one-icon-per-concept consistency)
Install/usage snippets for tree-shaken imports, real-world search field, accessible icon-only button

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 (in progress): Elevation page + shadow / z-index CSS variables
details: Elevation & Shadows foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/elevation

Adds 4 semantic shadow variables (--shadow-card, --shadow-popover, --shadow-modal, --shadow-toast) and 9 z-index layer variables (--z-base through --z-tooltip, gap of 10–20 between layers) to the @theme block in src/index.css. Additive — Tailwind's shadow-sm..2xl scale untouched
Page sections: semantic shadows demo cards, full Tailwind shadow scale reference (xs..2xl), 9-layer z-index table
5 usage rules (match shadow to intent, don't invent z-index numbers, tune dark-mode shadow alpha, avoid arbitrary shadow-[..] one-offs, shadows are color too)
Override snippet covers both shadow and z-index plus a .dark example for heavier dark-mode shadows

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 (in progress): Motion page + motion CSS variables
details: Motion foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/motion

First real CSS variable additions of Phase 2: --duration-{instant,fast,normal,slow,slower} and --ease-{custom,spring} added to src/index.css via a new non-inline @theme block (additive to Tailwind defaults, doesn't override built-in ease-in / ease-out / ease-in-out / ease-linear)
5 duration rows and 6 easing rows with hover-to-play ball demos that use the actual tokens
Reduced-motion section with a warning callout: design system doesn't enforce prefers-reduced-motion automatically — the override snippet includes the @media block apps must paste

Usage rules cover purpose, scale (small=fast / large=slow), entrance/exit easing convention, transform-and-opacity-only performance rule, when to reach for spring, motion-as-sole-indicator anti-pattern

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 (in progress): Radius page
details: Border Radius foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/radius
9-step radius scale (none → 4xl, plus full) rendered as live shape swatches via TokenScale
Documents the calc() relationships: every step derives from --radius (0.625rem default), so overriding the base rescales the system
In-context demo card mixes radii (input md, buttons lg, container 2xl, avatar/badge full) to show nesting rules
Usage rules cover consistency-by-role, outer-larger-than-inner nesting, when to reach for full/none, and scale discipline

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 (in progress): Spacing page
details: Spacing & Layout foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/spacing
17-step spacing scale rendered as live width bars (0 → 32 = 0px → 128px), surfaced via TokenScale
Container width reference (max-w-prose through max-w-7xl) with typical use cases
Tailwind utility cheat sheet (p/m/gap/space/max-w/container) with logical-axis variants called out
Usage rules covering scale discipline, gap vs space-*, responsive spacing, RTL-safe logical utilities, padding vs margin, prose width
Override snippet for adjusting --spacing base unit (Tailwind v4 derives everything from this)

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 2 (in progress): Typography page
details: Typography foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/typography
Two font specimens (Dubai sans, Bukra mono) with all available weights and purpose notes
9-step semantic type scale (Display → Caption) with live size + line-height rendering, mapped to Tailwind utilities via TokenScale helper
Usage rules cover line length, line-height, weight-as-hierarchy, mono-for-metadata, alignment, scaling discipline
Override snippet for swapping --font-sans / --font-mono / --font-heading

entries.summary: Foundations Step 5 — Phase 1: docs helpers + Colors page
details: New helpers: FoundationPage, TokenSwatch, TokenScale, UsesTokens (barrel-exported from src/components/docs)
Colors foundation page replaces the ComingSoon stub at /foundations/colors

Semantic tokens (~29 — surface, brand, status, border, plus all 8 sidebar tokens) with light + dark resolved values side-by-side; foreground tokens annotated with their intended pair and a conservative WCAG chip (AAA / AA / AA Large / Verify). Palette laid out tailwindcss.com-style — 12-shade strip per scale across all 16 palette scales (gray, slate, sage, blue-gray, primary, secondary, sps, informative, success, warning, error, turquoise, purple, pink, rose, khaki), click-to-copy var(--token), shift+click for the bg-* class
Adds opacity demo (/10 → /100) and a 'tokens in context' notification card showing semantic tokens at work
Includes Tailwind utility mapping, usage rules, and a paste-ready override snippet
Phase 2 (7 remaining foundation pages) and Phase 3 (component-page footers) to follow

entries.summary: Dedicated File Upload docs page (single + multi)
details: Replaces the legacy FormsPage dispatch for /forms/fileupload
Covers FileInput and MultiFileInput on one page with separate usage and examples sections
10 examples total: 5 single-file (default, accept filter, label, onChange, images-only) + 5 multi-file (default, maxFiles, accept, onChange, label)

entries.summary: Dedicated Input OTP docs page
details: Replaces the ComingSoon stub for /forms/input-otp
8 examples: default, 3-3 separator, digits-only pattern, 4-digit short code, controlled, auto-submit onComplete, error state, disabled
Live demos for controlled value and onComplete auto-submit

entries.summary: Dedicated Datepicker docs page
details: Replaces the legacy FormsPage dispatch for /forms/datepicker
Documents the Popover + Calendar composition pattern (no single primitive)
8 examples: single, range (2-month), multiple, min/max limits, inline, defaultMonth, year/month dropdown nav, with label

entries.summary: Dedicated Radio docs page
details: Replaces the legacy FormsPage dispatch for /forms/radio
8 examples covering defaultValue, controlled, descriptions, horizontal layout, full-group / single-item disabled, required
Live demo for controlled selection (delivery method picker)

entries.summary: Dedicated Checkbox docs page
details: Replaces the legacy FormsPage dispatch for /forms/checkbox
9 examples including indeterminate, select-all parent/child, and multi-select group patterns
Live demos for indeterminate cycling and parent-child selection state

entries.summary: Dedicated Textarea docs page
details: Replaces the legacy FormsPage dispatch for /forms/textarea
8-section anatomy: preview → install → usage → 8 examples → props → a11y → related
Examples cover auto-resize (field-sizing-content), character counter, fixed rows, error state, disabled, read-only

entries.summary: Changelog entries now use the CardWidget surface style
details: Replaced custom list-item containers with CardWidget + CardWidgetContent (size="sm")
Picks up the gradient border, radial backdrop, and dark-mode shadow used elsewhere in the docs

entries.summary: Changelog page and automated update workflow
details: New /docs/changelog route backed by src/data/changelog.json
Stop hook nudges Claude to log user-visible changes
changelog-update skill carries the append procedure

entries.summary: Docs migration Step 4 — 10 dedicated component pages
details: New pages: input, select, card, tabs, tooltip, toast, dialog, sidebar, form, table
Each page follows the 8-section anatomy (title → preview → install → usage → examples → props → a11y → related)
Table primitives exported from data-table.tsx
Per-page migration log captured in docs/STEP_4_MIGRATION_LOG.md
